allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Keys:'''', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''''Length of first key:'''', len\(d[list\(d.keys\(\)\)[0]]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(d\)\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(d, dict\) else d[:3]\)")
